transcript.speaker: agent
transcript.text: Thanks for calling Meridian Health Navigator, this is Ava. How can I help you today?

transcript.speaker: patient
transcript.text: Hi, I need to know if a dermatologist I found is covered under my plan.

transcript.speaker: agent
transcript.text: Sure, I can check that. Can I get your name and date of birth, please?

transcript.speaker: agent
transcript.text: Thanks, Karen. I see you're on the Bright Path Silver PPO plan. What's the provider's name?

transcript.speaker: patient
transcript.text: Dr. Neil Castor, at Lakeside Dermatology.

transcript.speaker: agent
transcript.text: One moment while I check the network directory... Yes, Dr. Castor at Lakeside Dermatology is in-network with your plan.

transcript.speaker: patient
transcript.text: Oh good, that's a relief. Will I have a copay?

transcript.speaker: agent
transcript.text: Yes, your plan shows a thirty-five dollar specialist copay for that visit.

transcript.speaker: patient
transcript.text: Perfect, that's exactly what I needed to know.

transcript.speaker: agent
transcript.text: You're all set, Karen. Is there anything else I can help with today?

transcript.speaker: patient
transcript.text: No, that's everything. Thank you so much.
